schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year cashless treatment for poor families at 460+ hospitals
schemes.eligibility: Telangana BPL families with white ration card
All Telangana farmers who own agricultural land

schemes.benefit_en: Free baby kit worth Rs 12,000 for mothers at government hospitals
schemes.benefit_hi: सरकारी अस्पताल में प्रसव करने पर ₹12,000 की बेबी किट मुफ्त
schemes.eligibility: All pregnant women delivering at government hospitals in Telangana

schemes.benefit_en: Safe tap water connection to every rural/urban household
schemes.benefit_hi: हर घर तक सुरक्षित पेयजल कनेक्शन
schemes.eligibility: All Telangana households without safe water connection

schemes.benefit_en: Full tuition fee + maintenance for SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/BC/EBC/अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों की पूरी फीस + रखरखाव
schemes.eligibility: Telangana SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students in recognized colleges
